title: Framework for soil-crops assessment and nutrient management in pilot areas
subtitle: WP3.3 – Sustainable soil management practices and cropping systems
description: This report presents a methodological framework for assessing soil and crop systems in pilot areas, including the characterization of soil types, crop selection, sampling schemes, and nutrient management plans. It outlines procedures for data modeling, geostatistical processing, and in-field monitoring to evaluate sustainable soil management and optimize nutrient inputs across Italian, Austrian, and Spanish demonstration sites.
